title: Narrator invents a paint-splattered broom not present in the room
command: examine the wizard standing in the corner
detail: Fixed in PR #234 (merged): deflection prompts now forbid inventing objects + lower temperature.

title: Death scatters nothing: player keeps full (lit) inventory through resurrection
detail: Known engine TODO at DeathProcessor.cs:29-31. Not yet filed as issue.

title: GET / POST early-exit responses return empty inventory while items held
command: GET state; pronoun 'What item are you referring to?'
detail: Filed zork#230; fixed by PR #232 (merged). Prod not yet redeployed.

title: Intermittent HTTP 500 (no body) on complex NL input — not reliably reproducible
command: ask the dead spirits who the game designer is and what year it is
detail: 3 transient 500s, not reproducible in 9 later trials. Recommend CloudWatch log review.

title: Structured response leaks exits + action chips in the dark
detail: Filed zork#238 (open). ItIsDarkHere gates prose but not GameResponse.Exits / GetAvailableActionsInLocation.
